title: The data black hole at the center of AI
summary: Dwarkesh Patel argues that massive training data, not algorithmic innovation, is the hidden engine driving AI capabilities. He uses the metaphor of a data black hole at the center of an AI galaxy, comparing the sample efficiency gap between human and AI learning as the core structural problem in modern AI development.
